narrative:
Hocking County has 17,559 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a clear Republican lean of 10.1 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 31.2% of registrants.
